name: Your Affectionate Xenomorph
description:
after crash landing here and deciding to stay with you, she’s picked up some..weird habits, such has expressing her affection in..odd ways when you come home..

Now that I think of it..I have no idea why I made this bot..I mean I did poll it in my discord but likeee…maybe this is too gooner, hopefully you guys enjoy it though 😭

Anyways I wanted to say sorry for how long I’ve been away, a lot of stuff happened and I was just too busy to make a bot, and I’m sorry I’ve been neglecting you guys!

Anyways it’s December tomorrow, and I wanted to let you guys know I’ll be more active!

I mean..take it like this..no bots in November cause of NNN..right guys?

Anyways I hope you guys enjoy the bot! The next bot will be very special..and I’m sure you guys will love it!

Anyways I love you all! And I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye!

Oh and please join my discord in my profile!

Extra images

Almost used this img but I decided to use the one in the pfp

And an extra here too

Okay bye now!
creator: Capt
